title: artocarpus scandens
intro: Artocarpus scandens, also known as the parkinsonia or wild jack, is a plant species belonging to the family Moraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Artocarpus scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and help in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Artocarpus scandens include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be made by boiling the roots and leaves of the plant in water.
